description_long: This is a modern drip coffee machine with a cylindrical body, primarily finished in a combination of matte black and light gray panels. The front features a glass carafe with a black handle, positioned on a circular warming plate, and a small red power indicator button below. The top is slightly domed and solid black, while the sides and back are smooth and unadorned, with a visible seam where the panels meet. A power cord extends from the rear, plugged into a wall outlet, indicating its electrical operation. The machine sits on a flat base, and the overall design is compact and functional, suitable for countertop use in kitchens, offices, or communal urban spaces.
description: A compact, cylindrical drip coffee machine with a glass carafe, black and gray panels, and a visible power cord. The design is modern and functional, ideal for countertop use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass carafe with handle, warming plate, and a red power button at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth black rear panel and the power cord extending from the back.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the flat, circular top of the coffee machine with no visible controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the rear black panel and the power cord plugged into the wall.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single round power button with a red indicator light is located at the lower front center of the base. No other controls or labels are visible.
